name: Lemon Bars
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Southern Living
Preparation Time: 0:30
1. Combine 2 cups flour and 1/2 cup powdered sugar. Cut butter into the flour mixture using a pastry blender until the mixture resembles coarse meal.
2. Spoon the flour mixture into an ungreased 13 x 9 x 2-inch pan and press firmly and evenly with fingertips.
3. Bake at 350 degrees for 20 to 25 minutes, or until the crust is lightly browned.
4. Combine the remaining 1/2 cup flour and baking powder; set aside.
5. In a separate bowl, combine eggs, 2 cups sugar, lemon rind (if desired), and lemon juice. Stir well.
6. Gradually stir in the dry ingredients into the egg mixture and pour over the baked crust.
7. Bake at 350 degrees for 25 minutes, or until lightly browned and set.
8. Cool on a wire rack. Dust lightly with powdered sugar, and cut into bars.
Yield: about 2 dozen.
